data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

There will be a scrimmage between Hyakkiyako and Gehenna.
Will everyone make it out unscathed?

🗓️Period: 11/29 (Tue) After Maintenance–12/13 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/102247![MTNPCM56hHGzg1aSrfpGDxKVnFwR9n7p.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/MTNPCM56hHGzg1aSrfpGDxKVnFwR9n7p.jpg)
